title: Spring Swing Weekender
excerpt: Vikend plny social dancingu, workshopov a live music pre komunitu v Kosiciach.
body:
Starter obsahuje plnohodnotnu event landing page, CTA bloky, FAQ, harmonogram aj prepojenie na registracie.

Ak doplnis Facebook Graph API token, tato sekcia vie tahat nazov, datum, popis aj cover obrazok priamo z FB eventu.

title: Solo Jazz Bootcamp
excerpt: Intenzivny workshop pre tanecnikov, ktori chcu zlepsit rytmus, groove a stage presence.
body: Bootcamp landing page moze obsahovat bio lektorov, video highlighty, cenove balicky a countdown.
